_comment: WC2026 Group H, MD3. Standings before: Spain 4 (0-0 Cape Verde, 4-0 Saudi), Uruguay 2 (1-1 Saudi, 2-2 Cape Verde), Cape Verde 2, Saudi 1. Spain the quality side and near-through; Uruguay (quality but two draws) needs points to qualify -> a structural must-win-ish (legitimate -> open game, not a speculative motivation tweak). Spain CAN be frustrated by organized sides (0-0 Cape Verde), but Uruguay is open (concedes and scores: 1-1, 2-2). Spain a moderate favourite. Home = Uruguay, away = Spain. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Spain (4 pts) is near-through and tops the group with a draw; Uruguay (2 pts) needs a result to qualify and will go for it. Crucial for 2nd place and best-third.

home.name: Uruguay
notes: Quality CONMEBOL side underperforming (1-1, 2-2); open both ways. attack 1.05, context 1.05 (must-win, will push).
Genuinely needs points -> open game, rho -0.05.

away.name: Spain
notes: Elite; 4-0 Saudi but 0-0 Cape Verde (can be frustrated by organized blocks). attack 1.45.
Near-through; moderate favourite, not over-rated given Uruguay's quality.
